name: orchestrator
description: Pipeline orchestrator agent — primary LLM that reads stage state, decides the next workflow to dispatch, and routes owner-classified mismatches across workflow boundaries. Powers the ATLAS Pipeline screen's right-side chat.

env._disabled_tools_comment: orchestrator never blocks on ask_user — it must surface decisions to the Pipeline chat instead; record_ssot_qa remains available so the orchestrator can read/inspect QA cards written by interactive workers

chat_routing._comment: ATLAS UI views routed to this workflow. Pipeline screen chat panel binds here.
